subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh forth in the Name of God! The call hath been raised from the Sinai Tree, yet the people remain veiled in concealment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من نطق باسم الله قد ارتفع الندآء من سدره السیناء و القوم تواروا فی الحجاب
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
